---
pagetitle: "Publications"
page-layout: full
title: ""
bibliography: references/publications.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

::: {.image-banner}
![](images/banners/publications-banner.png)
:::

::: {.content-section}

For the most up-to-date publication record, please also see [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=sIqvB2oAAAAJ).

# Selected Publications

::: {#refs}
:::

:::
